content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 5, 2004

Janet Nguyen
12866 Main Street, Suite 202
Garden Grove, CA 92840

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-170

Dear Ms. Nguyen:

This letter is in response to your request on behalf of Friends of Janet Nguyen for advice regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1

You have recently been advised by the city clerk for the City of Garden Grove that your campaign logo and letterhead may be in violation of FPPC guidelines. You are running in the November 2004 election for the Garden Grove City Council.

The Political Reform Act does not regulate the content or format of campaign letterhead or logos. Therefore, we are withdrawing your request for advice. You should obtain a copy of the FPPC Campaign Information Manual for Local Candidates (Manual 2), available on our website (www.fppc.ca.gov) or from the city clerk.

If you have questions concerning this letter or your campaign disclosure requirements, please call our toll-free advice line at 866-ASK-FPPC.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Chief, Technical Assistance Division

CW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-170

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
